generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been following this strategic autonomy debate closely, and I'm really concerned about how much we're relying on foreign tech for our critical infrastructure. Just last month, a major power grid incident in Europe was traced back to a vulnerability in a foreign-made system. We can't afford to be this exposed. It's time to invest in our own tech and secure our future. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
